recapPrompt.prompt: What is the strongest clue that a heap might help?

choices.label: You need the next smallest, largest, or top-k item often
choices.feedback: Correct. Heaps are strong when one important item must stay easy to reach.

choices.label: You need every item in perfect sorted order all the time
choices.feedback: Not this one. Full sorting points away from heaps and toward sorting directly.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain how a heap is different from a fully sorted list.
